questions.q: At the ARVO 2026 annual meeting on May 6, 2026, MingMed Biotechnology presented Phase II data showing their oral drug QA102 reduced the growth rate of drusen volume in patients with what condition?
In May 2026, a former FedEx driver was sentenced to death in Texas for the 2022 kidnapping and murder of which seven-year-old girl?
Former Alberta Premier Jason Kenney announced he was retaining legal counsel in May 2026 following a massive data leak linked to which organization's database?

A report announced by the World Resources Institute and The Rockefeller Foundation on May 6, 2026, found that investing $1 in climate health solutions in low- and middle-income countries can yield up to how much in benefits?
The Trump administration announced in May 2026 that it is closing a federal watchdog office dedicated to monitoring abuses in which specific area?
Canadian musician Ashley MacIsaac launched a $1.5M lawsuit against Google on May 5, 2026, after an AI Overview falsely identified him as what?
Airbus secured a major order in May 2026 for up to 150 Canadian-made A220 commercial planes from which airline?
On May 6, 2026, Cleveland Clinic researchers reported that patients with inflammatory bowel disease face a significantly elevated risk of what complication 31 to 90 days after colon cancer surgery?
